MO2 WebAPI Plugin

✓ API is running

The backend API is operational, but no frontend is built yet.

Getting Started

To use the web interface, you need to build the frontend:

cd frontend
bun install
bun run build

API Endpoints

  • /health - Health check
  • /mods - List all mods
  • /mods/enabled - List enabled mods
  • /profile - Current profile

WebSocket

Real-time events available at: ws://localhost:5001

Documentation

See README.md and FRONTEND_GUIDE.md for more information.
